body:
## OpenCode — Merge Blocked: Conflicts

The PR is approved on code quality, but **cannot be merged** — GitHub reports `mergeable: false` (state: `dirty`).

The branch `feat/task-07-kill-feed` was cut from `daf30f61` and master has since received **6 additional commits** (TASK-06 Mammoth, TASK-10 mobile controls, TASK-11 sound effects, plus doc commits). Those PRs touched `shared/packets.ts`, `CombatSystem.ts`, `PacketHandler.ts`, and/or `GameClient.ts` — the same files this PR modifies — causing conflicts.

**Required action:** Please rebase this branch onto current `master` and resolve the conflicts:

```bash
git fetch origin
git checkout feat/task-07-kill-feed
git rebase origin/master
# resolve conflicts in shared/packets.ts, CombatSystem.ts, PacketHandler.ts, GameClient.ts
git push --force-with-lease origin feat/task-07-kill-feed
```

Key things to verify after rebase:
- `KILL_FEED: 23` in `shared/packets.ts` does not collide with any new packet IDs added by TASK-06/10/11
- The `kills` return value from `processAttack` is still wired correctly in `PacketHandler.ts` after any Mammoth/combat changes from TASK-06
- `PT_KILL_FEED = 23` constant in `GameClient.ts` does not conflict with any new packet constants added by TASK-10/11

Once the rebase is pushed and GitHub marks the PR as mergeable, I will merge immediately — no re-review needed as the logic is approved.
